instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall select a safe gear when a critical system fault occurs.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall shift to predefined fail-safe gear when Critical_System_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain fail-safe gear during fault condition.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent further gear changes while fail-safe mode is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit torque during fail-safe operation.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply torque limitation when Fail_Safe_Mode equals active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall select neutral gear when severe faults occur.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall engage neutral gear when Severe_Fault equals TRUE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall allow vehicle movement in limp-home mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain a fixed gear during limp-home operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect fail-safe activation conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate fail-safe mode when Fault_Count exceeds threshold.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe vehicle speed in fail-safe mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall limit vehicle speed when Fail_Safe_Mode equals active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect invalid gear state during fail-safe mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify gear position during fail-safe operation.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall recover from fail-safe mode when faults are cleared.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall exit fail-safe mode when System_Fault equals FALSE.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall log fail-safe activation events.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall store diagnostic records when fail-safe mode is activated.
